creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Dear submitter, 

I didn't find the test program you have suggested, could you 
please give me a pointer? 

A wild guess on the problem:  usually, this is caused by 
sizeof(int) != sizeof(void *), i.e. forgot to include certain 
header file.  Is there any warnings issued by the compiler?
